TestCase z14Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_list = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_list, t1.list, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.list = follow_case_list;
    // ------------------------------------
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    // Swap two random elements (indices within 0..n‑1)
    int idx1 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    while (idx2 == idx1) {
        idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    }
    int temp = follow_case.list[idx1];
    follow_case.list[idx1] = follow_case.list[idx2];
    follow_case.list[idx2] = temp;
    return follow_case;
}
